About Me

I’m Muhammad Ilyas Bacha, a BIM Engineer and Civil Engineer based in Peshawar, Pakistan. I bridge the gap between digital design and physical construction through precise, coordinated BIM workflows.

With expertise in Revit, Navisworks, and AutoCAD Civil 3D, I lead multidisciplinary coordination, detect and resolve clashes before they reach the site, and deliver ISO 19650-compliant models for infrastructure and commercial projects.

My approach combines engineering precision with digital intelligence — transforming complex construction challenges into clean, buildable models that teams can trust.
